intro:
Nellore is a major city in Andhra Pradesh on the Coromandel Coast, known for its aquaculture industry and growing residential and commercial sectors along the Chennai–Hyderabad corridor. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 680+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Nellore.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Nellore's position on the NH-16 highway between Chennai and Hyderabad makes it a key relocation hub requiring vendors with excellent intercity connectivity. Our verified partners plan every move for efficiency — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Nellore. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Nellore?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹4,000. 2 BHK typically ₹6,000 – ₹12,000 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Nellore?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Nellore and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
